metadata.title: Insyta — The supervisor for your AI agents
metadata.description: Connect your agent, see where it fails, and let our AI improve it automatically.

hero.title: The supervisor your AI agent needs
hero.subtitle: Connect your WhatsApp and Instagram conversations and get an actionable dashboard: scores, trends, alerts and improvement proposals to see where your agent resolved the need and where it's costing you sales.
hero.trust: No code · Connect in 5 minutes · WhatsApp, WATI, Respond.io and SDK
hero.cardsHint: Real conversations evaluated · click to open the case file

card.label: Evaluated conversation
card.pattern: Order tracking + frustration — score 31% below baseline
card.improvement: Ask for the order number before escalating and give a concrete ETA.

problem.title: Your agent works alone. Who's watching it?
problem.subtitle: SMBs selling on WhatsApp and Instagram have no visibility into the quality of what their bot replies. Every failed conversation is a lost sale — and nobody notices.
before: No quality monitoring of the replies
You don't know which conversations the bot failed
Only aggregate reports: message counts and response times
The owner decides blind, without data
Hallucinations no one sees until the complaint arrives
after: Quality score per conversation, in real time
Early alerts on statistical deviations (SPC + drift)
Improvement recommendations that are validated, not hunches
The full cycle: detect → diagnose → improve → verify
Detects when the bot changes behavior (degradation, provider change)

howItWorks.title: A closed loop that improves your agent every week
howItWorks.subtitle: It's not analytics or passive observability. It's the full cycle that supervises, corrects and verifies your agent: detect → diagnose → improve → verify.

steps.title: Connect your agent
steps.description: WhatsApp, WATI, Respond.io or our SDK. Without touching your bot, in minutes.

steps.title: We diagnose every conversation
steps.description: An LLM-as-judge scores resolution, satisfaction, tone and frustration from 0 to 100, and we watch deviations with statistical process control.

steps.title: We detect patterns and drift
steps.description: We cluster the bad conversations by topic and dimension, and alert when the agent starts to degrade.

steps.title: We improve and verify
steps.description: We propose prompt changes, validate them with semantic regression testing and measure the impact by comparing audits before and after each improvement.

features.title: Observability, auditing and continuous improvement for your agent

items.title: Score per conversation
items.description: An LLM-as-judge scores every chat 0–100 across 10 dimensions: resolution, tone, satisfaction, frustration and more.

items.title: Statistical control (SPC) + drift
items.description: We detect quality deviations with statistical process control techniques and warn you when your agent starts to degrade.

items.title: Validated improvements
items.description: Every prompt recommendation is validated with semantic regression testing before you apply it. No hunches.

items.title: Early alerts
items.description: We notify you the moment the score drops, frustration rises or a statistical deviation appears — before it turns into lost sales.

items.title: Anti-hallucination
items.description: We catch risky answers and hallucinations before they cause a legal problem or an angry customer.

items.title: Multi-agent and agencies
items.description: One panel for all your bots, projects and clients, with per-organization isolation.

integrations.title: Connect in 5 minutes, without touching your bot
integrations.subtitle: Insyta lives on top of your current stack. Bring your conversations from where you already have them.

dashboardPreview.title: An actionable dashboard, not another metrics panel
dashboardPreview.subtitle: Everything that happened across your WhatsApp and Instagram chats, in one place: what the agent resolved, what slipped through and what to change to sell more.

rows.text: “Do you have the blue model in stock?”

attention.text: 3 customers asked “where's my order?” and the agent didn't resolve it
Instagram complaint with no reply for 2 h
The score for “stock questions” dropped 12 pts this week

dashboardPreview.improvementText: When customers ask about an order, request the number before escalating and give a concrete ETA.

items.a: No. Insyta is the improvement layer that lives on top of your current bot. We don't sell chatbots: we supervise and improve the one you already have.

items.q: Do I need to code to start?
items.a: Not for WhatsApp, WATI or Respond.io: the connection is plug-and-play. The SDK (Node and Python) is only for custom integrations.
Yes. We anonymize sensitive data (PII) before any text reaches an LLM, and every query runs with multi-tenant isolation at the database level.

items.q: How much does it cost to evaluate conversations?
items.a: Cents per conversation. We use Claude Haiku with caching, which makes it viable to analyze millions of chats without the cost blowing up.

items.q: How soon do I see results?
items.a: The first evaluations show up instantly. Improvements are proposed from each audit and their impact is measured by comparing audits before and after each change.

cta.title: Stop flying blind
cta.subtitle: Connect your agent and find out today where it's failing — and how much it's costing you.

footer.tagline: The supervisor for your AI agents. It finds where they fail, proposes improvements and measures the impact.
footer.madeWith: Built to make your agent the best.

landing.title: Insyta
landing.tagline: The continuous-improvement layer for AI agents.
landing.subtitle: Connect your agent, see where it fails, and let our AI improve it automatically.
